2201280.name: RPG Maker MV - KR Legendary Palaces - Arachnid Tileset
2201280.description:
The lair of the Spider people! Creep out your party with the Arachnid tileset!

Includes:

Ground Tiles:

3 colors of water – blue, gray and red
Plain stone floor in gray and red
Tile floor in gray and red
Metal panel floor in gray and red
Pits
Spiderwebs across pits

Walls:

Walls that match the floor tiles – stone, tile, metal panel included! Also includes roof/edge tiles to match.

Also featuring:

stairs to match flooring
small accent pillars
large accent pillars (plain and themed)
plain arch
detailed arch
raised platform
coordinated throne
windows (large and small)
treasure chest (with animated version)
push block
bridge rails
multiple statues – large and small
magic rings
diagonal stairs
3 designs of ladders
plus more!

Events and Animations

Includes matching treasure chest.

Terms of Use:

* This pack is for use in RPG Maker Series or the engine of your choice.
* OK to be used in Commercial projects
* Contents can be edited
* OK for use in games with gore
* OK for use in adult-rated games
2201280.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 日语, 韩语, 繁体中文, 阿拉伯语, 简体中文
